headline: Is Realty Income (O) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Swings And Conflicting Valuations
summary: If you are asking whether Realty Income at US$62.24 is giving you enough value for the risk you take, you are asking the right question for this stock. The stock is up 1.2% over the last week and 8.6% year to date, while it is down 4.1% over the past month and has returned 19.0% over the last year, 24.4% over three years and 19.9% over five years. Recent headlines have continued to focus on Realty Income's role as a large listed real estate investment trust, including coverage of its status...

headline: A Monthly Dividend Portfolio That Pays Like a Pension and Beats Most Pensions on Inflation Protection
summary: A traditional defined-benefit pension paying $5,500 per month, or $66,000 annually, provides a useful retirement-income benchmark. That level of income sits near the upper range of what many private-sector pensions deliver, and it represents the amount a 67-year-old married couple would need to recreate if offered a lump-sum payout instead of guaranteed monthly checks for ... A Monthly Dividend Portfolio That Pays Like a Pension and Beats Most Pensions on Inflation Protection
